title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude Fable 5 successfully completed Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots and vision capabilities, without maps or navigation aids. This demonstrates multimodal reasoning and video game interaction capabilities that previous Claude versions required complex helper infrastructure to achieve.
writeup: The video documents Claude Fable 5 completing Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots and vision, without maps or navigation aids. It matters because earlier Claude versions needed complex helper infrastructure to reach comparable game-playing results. The takeaway: the model handled multimodal reasoning and video game interaction directly from visual input, removing the scaffolding prior versions relied on.
